scripts.monitor:show: powershell -NoProfile -Command "if (Test-Path ./logs/system-monitor.log) { Get-Content ./logs/system-monitor.log -Tail 60 } else { Write-Host 'No log file yet. Start with npm run local.' }"
scripts.monitor:tail: powershell -NoProfile -Command "if (Test-Path ./logs/system-monitor.log) { Get-Content ./logs/system-monitor.log -Wait } else { Write-Host 'No log file yet. Start with npm run local.' }"
